reason: The finding description explicitly states that enabling FIPS mode on a preexisting system is not supported and that if the rule fails on an installed system, it is a permanent finding. Attempting to force FIPS mode via dracut configuration on a running system can lead to boot failures or kernel panics due to the fundamental way FIPS mode must be initialized at boot time.
estimated_impact: reboot required; Kernel boot failure; System instability; Incompatibility with existing cryptographic modules; Non-supported procedure for existing installations
